time.description: Time of day in HH:MM format.

day.description: Single day of the week (lowercase). Use either day or days.

days.description: One or more days of the week (lowercase). Use either days or day.

time.description: Time of day in HH:MM format.

schedule.description: When and how often the agent runs.

script.description: PowerShell script path relative to the execution root. The script must write true or false to stdout.

$schema.description: Path or URL to this schema file.

prompt.description: The prompt to send to Copilot CLI.

agent.description: Agent file reference passed via the --agent flag.

script.description: Path to a PowerShell script (.ps1) to execute instead of Copilot CLI. Relative paths are resolved from the repo root.

runIf.description: Optional execution condition. Use git-dirty, file-changed:<path>, or { "script": "relative/path.ps1" }.

skipOnBattery.description: Skip execution when the machine is on battery power.

retryCount.description: Number of times to retry on process failure (non-zero exit code or timeout). Summary-derived functional failures are detected after the final attempt and are not retried.

model.description: Model override for the Copilot CLI invocation.

denyTools.description: List of tool names to deny during the run.

extraCliFlags.description: Additional CLI flags passed to the Copilot CLI invocation.

workingDirectory.description: Working directory or project path for this agent. Null = use global default (allow all directories).

envVars.description: Environment variables to set for the agent run.

notifyOnFailure.description: Show a Windows toast notification when the agent fails or times out.

notifyOnSuccess.description: Show a Windows toast notification when the agent completes successfully.

raiseAttention.description: Controls when the run-summarizer flags a run as needing attention. 'all' (default): flag on actionable failures (non-zero exit, timeout, or summary result failure), actionable results, and significant changes. 'failures-only': only on actionable failures. 'significant-changes': on actionable failures and significant changes such as codebase/PR changes or deployments, but not routine monitoring results. 'never': never flag attention (results are visible in the dashboard but won't trigger the banner).

notificationSound.description: Notification sound for this agent. Use a preset name (Default, IM, Mail, Reminder, SMS, Alarm, Call, None) or a file path to a custom .wav file. Alarm/Call variants (Alarm2–Alarm10, Call2–Call10) are also accepted. Only applies when notifyOnFailure or notifyOnSuccess is enabled and global notifications is true.

oneOf.description: Agent mode: runs a named agent with a prompt on a schedule.
Prompt-only mode: runs a prompt without a specific agent on a schedule.
Manual agent mode: runs a named agent with a prompt, triggered only via CLI or dashboard.
Manual prompt-only mode: runs a prompt without a specific agent, triggered only via CLI or dashboard.
Script mode: runs a user-provided script on a schedule.
Manual script mode: runs a user-provided script, triggered only via CLI or dashboard.
